_description: DreiscSeo redirect patterns: 301->404 chains, active/inactive, case-sensitivity trap

entries._case: 301->404 chain: DreiscSeo redirect points to a deactivated category
entries.fix: PATCH active:false on this DreiscSeo entry

entries._case: Fixed: DreiscSeo redirect deactivated to break 301->404 chain
TRAP: Case-insensitive redirect loop. DO NOT create redirects where source and target differ only in case
entries.note: DreiscSeo matches case-insensitively. Source 'blog/' matches target 'Blog/' = infinite 301 loop. Fix via Nginx, not DreiscSeo.
